lastReleaseMessage: Extract pathfinding + spatial index; two scaling wins

barRaise.topFinding: Three substantive engineering commits landed since the last bar-raise, which is what the prior strategic finding asked for: v0.59.7 (fog-hitch fix plus smoothness), v0.59.8 (thirteen correctness-preserving hot-path optimizations), and v0.59.9 (A* extracted into pathfinder.gd with a binary min-heap, O(P log P) vs O(P^2), and spatial buckets extracted into spatial_index.gd with get_units_near, O(N*k) vs O(N^2) collision). The swaps were independently verified behavior-preserving, and the god-file ratchet improved (iso_grid 2469 to 2280, baseline ratcheted in lockstep). The run also root-caused the most concrete bug in weeks: the dashboard audit block has been null for the entire 06-11 to 06-29 window because write-dashboard-status.ps1:53 globs AUDIT-*.md, which never matches CANONICAL_AUDIT-*.md. That carried LOW is now a root-caused HIGH with a one-line fix. Two gaps ride alongside the perf work: no frame profile was captured against the M4 60-FPS target across three perf commits plus an algorithmic change, and the two new algorithm modules have zero headless test coverage. Verdict stays in-progress: the game builds, ships, and saves cleanly, and the HIGH is a dashboard-display bug, not runtime breakage.

actions.title: Fix the audit glob at write-dashboard-status.ps1:53 (AUDIT-*.md to CANONICAL_AUDIT-*.md) and re-run the BR release so the dashboard audit block stops being null.
Capture one peak-wave frame profile on a v0.59.9 build and record FPS plus top costs in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md to set the M4 60-FPS baseline.
Drop the dead class_name WorldGenerator from source/world/world_generator.gd:7; the caller already preloads it as WorldGen.
Add headless tests for pathfinder (open/walled/unreachable optimality) and spatial_index get_units_near (box-edge boundary).
Re-stamp docs/ARCHITECTURE.md toward v0.59.9, add the v0.59.7/.9 extraction deltas, and remove the deleted ASSET_SCALE_MASTER reference.

deferred.title: Migrate tracked Spine art and the GDExtension payload off normal git history to git-LFS (.git is 460 MB).
deferred.reason: backlog-parked (br-bp-git-lfs-2026-06-16); risky on FUSE mount, revisit at a natural break

deferred.title: Take Navy's on-screen-size rifleman Spine re-export when it lands.
